headline: Is It Time To Revisit International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) After Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: If you are wondering whether International Flavors & Fragrances is fairly priced or offering some value right now, starting with a clear look at what the market is saying about the stock can be helpful. The share price last closed at US$78.19, with a mixed return profile that includes a 12.1% gain over the last 30 days, 14.9% year to date, but a 33.9% decline over 5 years and a 1.5% decline over the last year. Those numbers sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in the company as a key...
